# Economy Contract (Generated)

Contract: `ECONOMY-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `economy`
Version: `2026-03-21`

Rules: 4

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-ECON-001 | must | creator-world-economy-is-auditable | World creator economy and access economics remain auditable, explicit, and separate from narrative runtime. |
| R-ECON-002 | must | compute-not-billed-as-realm-truth | AI compute route cost is not modeled as Realm core truth or hidden world mutation. |
| R-ECON-003 | must | revenue-share-is-explicit | Revenue and settlement logic use explicit event types and share plans with append-only accounting. |
| R-ECON-004 | must | no-hidden-cross-domain-economics | Apps cannot hide economic state changes inside narrative history or memory commits. |

Entities: 3

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| CreatorKey | CreatorKey | id, creatorId, tier, status |  |
| SharePlan | SharePlan | id, eventType, status | participants, metadata |
| RevenueEvent | RevenueEvent | id, eventType, traceId | payload |

Required operations: 4
- GET /api/economy/subscription
- POST /api/economy/reviews
- GET /api/economy/gifts/received
- GET /api/economy/gifts/sent

Secondary operations: 1
- GET /api/economy/balances
